channel.title: Manoj Dahal | Blog
channel.description: Insights on full-stack development, design systems, remote teams, performance, and modern web architecture by Manoj Dahal.

item.title: Building Performant Full-Stack Apps in 2025
item.description: Key architectural decisions and tooling choices that are helping me ship faster without sacrificing quality in 2025.

item.title: Designing Systems That Actually Scale
item.description: How I approach component libraries and design tokens to create consistent experiences across products.

item.title: Lessons from Leading Remote Teams
item.description: Practical advice on communication, mentorship, and shipping great work when everyone works from different time zones.

item.title: The Case for Edge-First Architectures
item.description: Why moving more logic to the edge is changing how I think about latency, personalization, and deployment.

item.title: Mastering React Server Components
item.description: A practical guide to when and how to use RSC in production, with real patterns from my work.

item.title: How I Run Effective Async Standups
item.description: The simple format and tools that keep distributed teams aligned without daily video calls.

item.title: From Monolith to Modular: A Real Migration Story
item.description: How we successfully split a 5-year-old monolith into independent services without downtime.

item.title: The Hidden Power of Design Tokens
item.description: Why treating design decisions as data unlocks consistency, theming, and developer velocity.

item.title: Why I Switched to Edge Functions for Everything
item.description: From auth to A/B testing — how running logic at the edge transformed my apps.

item.title: Building Psychological Safety in Remote Teams
item.description: Practical tactics I use to make people feel safe to speak up, take risks, and admit mistakes.

item.title: Lessons Learned from 3 Major Refactors
item.description: What worked, what failed, and the patterns I now follow before touching any legacy code.

item.title: Image Optimization That Actually Moves the Needle
item.description: Modern techniques (AVIF, responsive images, preload) that cut load times by 40%+ in real projects.
